job_title: Technical Product Marketing Engineer - Developer Services
job_description:
• 3-4 years of experience in application development, developer relations, solutions engineering, or technical product marketing at a high-tech companyHands-on development experience building enterprise applications (CRM, ERP, SaaS platforms, or custom web applications)Strong coding skills across the modern development stack:Frontend: Proficiency in JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and modern frameworks (React, Vue, Angular, or LWC)Backend/API Development: Experience with RESTful APIs, webhooks, or backend languages (Node.
• )Platform Development: Comfort working with cloud platforms, databases, and deployment pipelinesProven ability to build end-to-end product demos and technical reference applications, from architecture design through deploymentStrong technical writing and presentation skills, with experience creating developer-focused documentationWillingness to travel to run technical workshops, speak at developer events, and lead hands-on coding sessions.
